steps.title: Find the removal rate
steps.content:
After $5$ hours, the amount removed was
$$
24{,}000-19{,}350=4{,}650
$$
So the hourly removal rate was
$$
\frac{4{,}650}{5}=930
$$

steps.title: Model the remaining corn
steps.content:
If $x$ is the number of hours, the number of bushels remaining is
$$
y=-930x+24{,}000
$$

steps.title: Solve for the target amount
steps.content: Set the remaining corn equal to $12{,}840$: $$ -930x+24{,}000=12{,}840 $$ $$ 11{,}160=930x $$ $$ x=12 $$ The answer is D.
